title: Elytras Disabled
description: Disallows any elytra-like flight, works with modded elytras!
body:
# **Disables any elytra-like flight in game.**

![Disabled Elytra Flight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0bfe752b0ba466cab59e32accaa54d33dc23d5f.png)


## - Elytra's are too overpowered.
## - Works against those players who try to run away during a fight!
## - Makes space for other flight machinery, (flight mods, flying machines.)
## - Better than other elytra removal mods that ignore modded elytras.
